name: 19th Floor
overview: College student Chunyu, estranged from her father, is pulled into a mysterious game called "19 Floors." Teaming up with clever and strong allies, she must survive terrifying challenges and uncover the game's secrets.

trailers.title: 【ENG SUB|Trailer】魏哲鸣孙千第19层解密之旅即将开启 无限流玩家集结令正式发出 | 19层 19th Floor | MangoTV Monsoon
